article_meta.title: video Investment strategist debunks market 'narratives,' shares strategy for upcoming year Charles Schwab managing direc

reasoning: Mostly neutral summary with one instance of adopting the article’s loaded framing (“debunk”); otherwise factual and balanced. Perspectives in the sources_represented field are incomplete.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses the article’s verb “debunk,” which carries a dismissive tone; rest of verbs are neutral.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Claims about strikes and rulings are supported by items listed in the article.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: “Debunk prevailing market narratives” implies those narratives are false without attribution or distancing.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; no amplified drama beyond the single loaded verb.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Minor inference of intent via “to debunk,” otherwise avoids mental state claims.
custom_reasoning.slant: Covers multiple labor actions and viewpoints without favoring one side.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Summary mentions unions, companies, and officials; no major perspective omitted from the narrative.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Generally neutral diction; “debunk” is the main loaded term.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced presentation of events and impacts.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Includes both expert/official and labor perspectives without preference.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Largely neutral but echoes the source’s “debunk” framing once.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: sources_represented lists only the outlet, omitting distinct perspectives (e.g., unions, companies, government officials, experts).
